steps.title: Use the context clue
steps.content: The research had a shortcoming: it focused too narrowly on a few countries. Later, researchers gained data from Africa and Eastern Europe, so the blank should mean they improved or reduced that limitation.

steps.title: Select the repair word
steps.content: Choice A means to permit or penalize, Choice B means to propose or assume, and Choice D means to justify. None fits researchers using new data to fix a weakness. The word ameliorate means make something bad less severe. The answer is C.
